zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Verdun於1275年1月10日出生在英國越可爾斯頓時，他的父親Sir John de Verdun II - Baron of Westmeath18歲，母親Eleanor de Furnival25歲。他於1294年6月26日與Margaret Knoville在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1349年7月29日在英國諾薩普頓史爾布利沃斯享年74歲。

zh-hans.Sheffield, West Riding, Yorkshire, Engla: 英国英格兰越可爾雪菲爾

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Verdun于1275年1月10日出生在英国越可爾斯頓时，他的父亲Sir John de Verdun II - Baron of Westmeath18岁，母亲Eleanor de Furnival25岁。他于1294年6月26日与Margaret Knoville在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1349年7月29日在英国諾薩普頓史爾布利沃斯享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Verdun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from any of several places in France called Verdun. The placename is probably of Gaulish origin, deriving from ver(n) ‘alder’ + dūn ‘hill, fortress’.
Spanish and Catalan: habitational name from Verdú in Catalonia (Spain), which has the same origin as the French name (see 1 above).
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Verdon  , a cognate of 1 above. This surname is very rare in Britain.

variants.name: Virden
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Verdun  .

variants.name: Verdon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Marcel, Pierre, Renaud, Sylvie.
French: habitational name from (Le) Verdon, the name of several places in various parts of France, for example in Dordogne, Gironde, and Marne. Compare   Ferdon  .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Verdun, the name of a fief in Vessey (Manche), France. Compare   Verdun  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Verdun was born on 10 January 1275, in Whiston, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir John de Verdun II - Baron of Westmeath, was 18 and his mother, Eleanor de Furnival, was 25. He married Margaret Knoville on 26 June 1294, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 29 July 1349, in Brixworth, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Verdun est né le 10 janvier 1275, à Whiston, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Verdun II - Baron of Westmeath, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Eleanor de Furnival, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Knoville le 26 juin 1294, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 29 juillet 1349, à Brixworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Verdun am 10. Januar 1275 in Whiston, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John de Verdun II - Baron of Westmeath 18 und seine Mutter Eleanor de Furnival 25. Er hat am 26. Juni 1294 in Yorkshire, England Margaret Knoville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 29. Juli 1349 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Brixworth, Northamptonshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Verdun è nato il il 10 gennaio 1275 nel Whiston, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John de Verdun II - Baron of Westmeath, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor de Furnival, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Knoville il 26 giugno 1294, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 29 luglio 1349, nel Brixworth, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Verdunが1275年1月10日にイギリスヨークシュアイアウィストンで生まれた時，父Sir John de Verdun II - Baron of Westmeathは18歳，母Eleanor de Furnivalは25歳であった。1294年6月26日にイギリスヨークシュアイアでMargaret Knovilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1349年7月29日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブリクスウオルスで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Verdun(이)가 1275년 1월 10일 영국 요르크실르 위스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de Verdun II - Baron of Westmeath(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor de Furnival(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1294년 6월 26일 영국 요르크실르에서 Margaret Knoville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1349년 7월 29일 영국 노르섬프토실르 브리스워스에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.10 January 1275–29 July 1349: 10 de janeiro de 1275–29 de julho de 1349
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Verdun nasceu em 10 de janeiro de 1275, em Whiston, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Verdun II - Baron of Westmeath, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor de Furnival, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Knoville em 26 de junho de 1294, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 29 de julho de 1349, em Brixworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Verdun родился 10 января 1275 г. в местности уистон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John de Verdun II - Baron of Westmeath было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor de Furnival, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Knoville 26 июня 1294 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 29 июля 1349 г. в местности бриксворт, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 74 лет.

es.10 January 1275–29 July 1349: 10 de enero de 1275–29 de julio de 1349
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Verdun nació el 10 de enero de 1275, en Whiston, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John de Verdun II - Baron of Westmeath, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Eleanor de Furnival, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Margaret Knoville el 26 de junio de 1294, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 29 de julio de 1349, en Brixworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 74 años.
